front: What is the opioid peptide discovery timeline?
back: 1975: Endorphins discovered (Hughes & Kosterlitz). 1976: Enkephalins identified. 1979: Dynorphin isolated. 1992: Endomorphins discovered. 1997: Orexin/hypocretin found. Key insight: endogenous opioids explain morphine's effects and led to receptor pharmacology (μ, δ, κ).
